case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO. VS LYNELL PAULE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,192.80 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO. AS TO DEFENDANT LYNELL PAULE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CERT MAIL TO PAUL LYNELL RETURNED SIGNED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYNELL PAULE $792.80 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $812.80, PLTF RECEIVED $400 PAYMENT FROM DEFT IN COURT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
